title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 28th January 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.stock: Gold ETF (Tata Gold ETF / Nippon Gold BeES / ICICI Pru Gold)
recommendations.note: Continue gold SIP/ETF; weak dollar and central-bank buying support gold
recommendations.detail: On a viewer's gold-vs-Jio-Finance SIP question, Kutumba Rao framed them as different asset classes and advised allocating across both. He endorsed continuing or adding gold via ETF (Tata Gold, Nippon Gold BeES or ICICI Pru Gold), noting these gave roughly 95-100% returns over the last year. He argued a weakening dollar index and central banks shifting reserves from treasuries into gold support gold over the long term.
